name: ListSettlementChargebacks
description: List all chargebacks included in a specific settlement. Chargebacks are disputed payments that customers have contested with their bank. Like refunds, chargebacks are subtracted from the settlement amount. This shows all chargeback transactions that reduced the payout for this settlement. You can optionally embed the full payment details for each chargeback.

settlement_id.description: The ID of the settlement to retrieve chargebacks for (e.g., 'stl_jDk30akdN').

from_.description: The chargeback ID to start retrieving the list from (for pagination).

limit.description: The maximum number of chargebacks to return per page. Valid range is 1-250, defaults to 50 if not specified.

embed.description: Embed additional information. Set to 'payment' to include the full payment object for each chargeback.
